name: Cocktail London Broil
recipeIngredient: Garlic bread slices made from one loaf of French baguette
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle both sides of a flank steak with meat tenderizer.
2. Stab thoroughly with a fork.
3. Spread both sides with barbecue sauce.
4. Place in a plastic bag.
5. Pour in red wine.
6. Marinate overnight.
7. Broil under high heat 2 inches from the heat source, 5-7 minutes on each side.
8. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
9. When well-chilled, slice very thin against the grain.
10. Arrange slices on one side of a platter.
11. On the other side, arrange garlic bread slices made from French baguette, spread with butter, garlic, and parsley.
12. Place toothpick container in the center of the platter.
13. Garnish with lemon leaves or parsley.
